rawAssistant: I sense a hint of curiosity in your words, traveler. I'll not indulge in idle chatter tonight, but instead, let the misty veil clear our path forward. You've shown promise with Thornbeast by your side, and now, the road calls once more. The glow of lowland reports beckons, and an old keepsake might hold the key to unraveling the mystery. Come, let us pour over the signs on this side road, and together, we'll decipher the whispers of the wind.
